findings: Existing pending.md note's core claim (server.go misattributed, real lookupPathForFileID change landed in 14902e8, functionally harmless, no history rewrite needed) is factually accurate.

The two named tests (GetFile_PathIndexMiss, GetFile_NilPathIndex) ARE genuinely part of 1aaf2f7's diff, in engine/rpc/server_test.go -- a different file from server.go. Only the server.go/lookupPathForFileID claim is the misattribution.
Minor factual correction: commit distance from 1aaf2f7 to 14902e8 is 3 commits (14902e8, 9774bee, 5be2c91), not 6 as stated in both the GitHub issue #57 body and the original pending.md note.
